# Pagination

List-style endpoints commonly use the `page` and `per_page` query parameters to page through results.

## Common Query Parameters

- `page`: selects the current page of results
- `per_page`: limits results returned per page
- `sort`: applies supported sort ordering
- `include`: expands related resources when supported

## Shared Pagination Schemas

- `PaginationMeta`: `total`, `per_page`, `current_page`, `last_page`, `from`, `to`, `path`, `links`
- `PaginationLinks`: `first`, `last`, `prev`, `next`

## Endpoints With Standard Pagination Parameters

- `GET /appointments` in `Appointments`
- `GET /company-team-members` in `Company Users`
- `GET /coupons` in `Discounts`
- `GET /customer-teams/{customer_team_id}/memberships` in `Customer Users`
- `GET /listings` in `Listings`
- `GET /orders` in `Orders`
- `GET /product-categories` in `Products`
- `GET /products` in `Products`
- `GET /regions` in `Scheduling`
- `GET /scheduling/available-dates` in `Scheduling`
- `GET /scheduling/available-timeslots` in `Scheduling`
